name: vsphere
description: VMware vSphere infrastructure management — VMs, hosts, datastores, and resource pools via the vSphere REST API

tools.name: list_vms
tools.description: List all virtual machines in vSphere, optionally filtered by power state or name

tools.name: get_vm
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific virtual machine

tools.name: manage_vm_power
tools.description: Power on, power off, suspend, or reset a virtual machine

tools.name: list_hosts
tools.description: List all ESXi hosts in the vSphere environment

tools.name: list_datastores
tools.description: List all datastores with capacity and free space information

tools.name: list_resource_pools
tools.description: List resource pools in the vSphere inventory
